creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Sorry,

my fault

Gimp has a check box under the menu 'windows' called something like 'hide docks' (I have it only in German). So just uncheck it - that is the solution.

I was thinking there is a relation to the wery anoing bug 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=205390


But I was maybe wrong.

So close this PR
